summary: Shop Navigation and Group Filtering bug fix verified. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All navigation links use correct group= parameter, secondary navigation shows group-specific items, group parameter preserved on sub-nav clicks.

Products API.GET /api/tiles/products?limit=1: PASS - Includes product_group field with value 'tiles'

Publish Endpoint.POST /api/supplier-sync/publish-to-websi: PASS - Endpoint exists and accepts product_group param

Navigation Menus.GET /api/website-admin/public/navigation: PASS - Returns 3 items: ALL FLOORING, VINYL, LAMINATE

Secondary Navigation.Tiles page (/tiles): PASS - Shows ALL TILES, WALL TILES, FLOOR TILES, PORCELAIN, POLISHED, MATT, SALE
Secondary Navigation.Flooring page (/tiles?group=flooring): PASS - Shows ALL FLOORING, VINYL, LAMINATE
Secondary Navigation.Group param preservation: PASS - Clicking VINYL preserves group=flooring in URL

Group Isolation.Tiles vs Flooring: PASS - Tiles: 556 products, Flooring: 0 products (correctly isolated)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (556 tiles products with product_group='tiles')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop navigation and group filtering is fully working. The tiles collection has 556 products all with product_group='tiles'. Flooring, materials, tools, accessories, underfloor-heating groups have 0 products (not published yet). The navigation_menus collection has shop_flooring menu with ALL FLOORING, VINYL, LAMINATE items. Main menu is empty so homepage uses fallback nav with correct group= params.

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Groups and sub-categories not showing in their own Navigation/Shop tabs, filters merged across all groups
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: tiles collection missing product_group field, /collections API accepted group param but never used it in DB query

fix_verified.navigation_links: VERIFIED - Homepage nav uses group= param for product groups
fix_verified.secondary_nav: VERIFIED - Group-specific secondary nav shows correct items
fix_verified.group_param_preservation: VERIFIED - Clicking sub-nav items preserves group param in URL
